name: git-time-machine
description: Hover over any line to see why it was written — powered by your Git history and AI.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: Git blame and repo indexing require a trusted workspace.

commands.title: Git Time Machine: Set GitHub Token
Git Time Machine: Set Gemini API Key
Git Time Machine: Index Current Repo
Git Time Machine: Clear Explanation Cache
Git Time Machine: Reset All Data

gitTimeMachine.githubToken.markdownDescription: **Deprecated** — use the `Git Time Machine: Set GitHub Token` command instead. Any value here will be auto-migrated to secure storage on first use and then cleared.

gitTimeMachine.geminiApiKey.markdownDescription: **Deprecated** — use the `Git Time Machine: Set Gemini API Key` command instead. Any value here will be auto-migrated to secure storage on first use and then cleared.

enumDescriptions: Faster and cheaper — slightly less precise.
Latest preview model — may change without notice.
gitTimeMachine.geminiModel.description: Gemini model used for hover explanations.

gitTimeMachine.maxPRs.description: How many recent merged PRs to index. Each PR becomes one episode.

gitTimeMachine.maxUnlinkedCommits.description: How many recent commits not tied to a PR to also index.

gitTimeMachine.maxIssues.description: How many issues to index. Set to 0 to skip issue indexing entirely.
